prompt.content:
Create a new slide and use the Scenario A costing model to calculate and list the updated Total NPV (ARO) for each assumption change below. Evaluate each change independently and do not aggregate effects:

• Credit-Adjusted Discount Rate increases to 8.80%
• Inflation Rate (Years 1–3) increases by one fifth
• Quantity of Earthworks (Short Haul – Re-slope) doubles
• Quantity for the Facility Pits 2–6 activity (5 pits @ 50M m³) becomes 0
• Unit Cost of Demolition (500k sq ft) increases to 3× its current value
• Quantity of Demolition (100k sq ft) equals the quantity of Demolition (150k sq ft)
• Unit Cost of Monitoring (Annual, Yrs 11–30) increases by 100%
• “Present Value (PV)” for every year is reduced to half its current value

From the eight resulting Total NPV (ARO) values, calculate and return the average (arithmetic mean), median, and range (maximum minus minimum).

Return all final values in USD, rounded to two decimal places.
